---
title: "ui.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/games/odin_protocol/ui.py"
loc: 89
complexity: 15
logic_score: 1.25
style_score: 3.52
intel_score: 3.20
overall_score: 2.57
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating OdinUI, render_manifest.

## Interaction Protocol
Import OdinUI and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [time](file://time)
- [rich.console](file://rich.console)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine)

### Exports
- `OdinUI`
- `render_manifest`
- `briefing`
